steps.description: Mount the short braces onto the base frame and secure them with a short push-fit pin, a tooth-lock washer, and a hex nut.
Attach the long brace to the assembly, align it, and secure it with a short push-fit pin, a tooth-lock washer, and a hex nut.
Install an additional short push-fit pin at the next fastening point with a tooth-lock washer and a hex nut.
Attach the wing beam and secure it in place with screw pins, a round washer, and an acorn nut.
Mount both wings and their wheels onto long pins and secure them with round washers, tooth-lock washers, and hex nuts.
Install the middle pin, mount a wheel and fit the pulley onto it, then secure with a round washer, a tooth-lock washer, and a hex nut.

items.criterion: The short braces must be mounted onto the base frame and secured with a short push-fit pin, a tooth-lock washer, and a hex nut.

items.criterion: The long brace must be attached to the assembly, aligned, and secured with a short push-fit pin, a tooth-lock washer, and a hex nut.
items.observable_action: The long brace is attached to the assembly.

items.criterion: An additional short push-fit pin must be installed at the next fastening point with a tooth-lock washer and a hex nut.
items.observable_action: An additional short push-fit pin is installed at the next fastening point.

items.criterion: The wing beam must be attached and secured in place with screw pins, a round washer, and an acorn nut.
items.observable_action: The wing beam is attached and secured in place.

items.criterion: Both wings and their wheels must be mounted onto long pins and secured with round washers, tooth-lock washers, and hex nuts.
items.observable_action: Wings and wheels are mounted onto long pins.

items.criterion: The middle pin must be installed, a wheel mounted, and the pulley fitted onto it, then secured with a round washer, a tooth-lock washer, and a hex nut.
items.observable_action: The middle pin is installed, a wheel is mounted, and the pulley is fitted onto it.
